name: Harlequin Dip
recipeInstructions:
1. Blend the sour cream and mayonnaise together.
2. Add the remaining ingredients to the blended mixture.
3. Mix well and cover the bowl.
4. Refrigerate for 1 hour before serving.
Makes 1 1/2 cups. Crisp carrot and celery sticks are the perfect accompaniments for this dip.
